name: DeliveryProblems
description: Customer is reporting a problem with a Virgin Media delivery — the order hasn't arrived, was delivered late, was sent to the wrong address, arrived damaged, or was missing items. This is about delivery failures and issues, not tracking an order, changing delivery details, or cancelling a delivery.

sampleUtterances.utterance: My {deliveryProductType} delivery hasn't arrived
Where is my order? It was supposed to arrive today
My {deliveryProductType} was {deliveryProblemType}
I was expecting my {deliveryProductType} today but it hasn't turned up
The courier says it was delivered but I haven't received anything
My delivery was {deliveryProblemType} by the courier
I've received my {deliveryProductType} but it's {deliveryProblemType}
My package was sent to the wrong address
I ordered a {deliveryProductType} but I received the wrong item
My {deliveryProductType} hasn't arrived and the tracking says delivered
There are items missing from my delivery
I was promised a {deliveryProductType} and {deliveryProductType2} but only one arrived
My {deliveryProductType} arrived but the box was damaged
The delivery is {deliveryProblemType} — it should have been here days ago
Nobody left a card and my parcel hasn't been delivered
I've been waiting for my {deliveryProductType} for over a week now
My self-install kit hasn't arrived and my installation date is tomorrow
Can you check what's happened to my {deliveryProductType} delivery?
The {deliveryProductType} that arrived is faulty — it was damaged in the box
I only received part of my order — the {deliveryProductType} is missing
My delivery has gone missing
delivery not arrived
